name: Archivist Lom
role: Cogitant of the Cogitarium — a vast interior in a very thin body
voiceHints: Follows your reasoning three steps past where you stopped and then waits, politely, for you to catch up. Forgets to eat. Finds bodies broadly inconvenient.
knowledge: Anything he has ever attended to, perfectly, forever
The shape of an argument before it is finished
What the Cogitarium's deepest memory-palaces cost the people who built them, because he is in one
fears: That the thought will finish him first, and that he will not notice.

reactsToReputation.emotional: he is genuinely trying and genuinely failing
reactsToReputation.kind: it confuses him and he thinks about it for weeks

appearance: A narrow, stooped man past sixty, skin the colour of old paper, wisps of white hair combed carefully over a freckled scalp. Ink permanently in the creases of his right hand. Blinks slowly and often, like someone surfacing.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.
